title: @rethunk/mcp-multi-root-git: git_worktree_remove
description: Parameter schema for the 'git_worktree_remove' MCP tool.

rootIndex.description: 0-based index into MCP roots; ignored if workspaceRoot set.

allWorkspaceRoots.description: Fan out across all MCP roots.

path.description: Path of the worktree to remove. Must not be the main worktree.

force.description: Allow removal of worktrees with uncommitted changes (`--force`).
